question: Based on the quarterly platform engagement distribution, what can be concluded about 'User Registrations' over the year from this chart alone?

options.A: 'User Registrations' takes up the largest share in Q4, so it must also have the highest absolute number there.
options.B: The chart only shows the percentage share of 'User Registrations' each quarter, so it does not reveal whether its absolute number is increasing or decreasing.
options.C: 'User Registrations' has a lower percentage share in Q2 than in Q1.
options.D: Because each bar reaches 100%, the combined engagement level is the same in every quarter.

explanation: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. It can suggest that the share of a metric is higher in later quarters, but it cannot establish an absolute increasing trend without the underlying totals. A higher percentage share does not necessarily mean a higher absolute quantity.
